message:
feat(delta): expand array payloads into individual ADD deltas and track field corrections

Two enhancements to the delta processing pipeline:

delta-parser.ts — ADD deltas with array payloads (e.g. payload: [{...}, {...}])
are now expanded into individual ADD deltas, one per array element. This
handles the common case where an LLM emits a single ADD with multiple
items instead of separate ADDs. Non-ADD operations and non-array payloads
pass through unchanged. parseDeltaBlock() now returns ParsedDelta[] to
support the expansion.

artifact-merge.ts — normalizePayloadFields() and coerceDomainStrings()
now return correction lists describing what was renamed or type-coerced.
This supports downstream debugging and audit logging when field aliases
are resolved (e.g. "research_statement" → "statement") or domain values
are stringified (e.g. array → JSON string). The corrections tracking is
structural only — no behavioral change to how payloads are processed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
